hero.label: About High Dam Group
hero.title: Built to remove complexity from projects and replace it with certainty.
hero.description: A fully integrated, execution-driven business group supporting Oil & Gas operators, EPC contractors, government entities, and mega project developers across the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

ceo.title: A message from our Chief Executive Officer.
ceo.quote: We believe sustainable success is built through trust, accountability, and delivering excellence every single day.
ceo.message: Every project we undertake represents more than construction—it reflects our commitment to our clients, our people, and the communities we serve. By combining technical excellence, innovation, and uncompromising safety standards, we continue to build lasting partnerships and create long-term value across every sector we operate in.
ceo.name: Hadi Musfer Ali Al Gashanin

hero.label: Health, Safety & Environment
hero.title: Zero harm to people and the environment.
hero.description: The Group is fully committed to conducting all activities in a manner that protects people, assets, and the environment, in alignment with ARAMCO, SABIC, and EPC HSE requirements.

overview.title: Our commitment to excellence in safety.
overview.description: High Dam Group has implemented a comprehensive HSE management system that ensures the safety and well-being of all personnel, protection of assets, and environmental stewardship.

pillars.title: Safety Management
pillars.desc: Comprehensive safety management systems aligned with international standards and local regulations.

pillars.title: Risk Prevention
pillars.desc: Proactive risk assessment and mitigation strategies to prevent incidents before they occur.

pillars.title: Training & Awareness
pillars.desc: Continuous HSE training programs for all employees, subcontractors, and site personnel.

pillars.title: Compliance
pillars.desc: Full compliance with ARAMCO, SABIC, and government HSE requirements and regulations.

commitment.title: Safety is not just a policy, it's our culture.
commitment.description: Every member of High Dam Group is committed to working safely and ensuring the safety of others.

items.title: People First
items.desc: The safety and well-being of our people is our highest priority, above all production targets.

items.title: Zero Harm Goal
items.desc: We strive for zero injuries, zero illnesses, and zero environmental incidents on every project.

items.title: Shared Responsibility
items.desc: Safety is everyone's responsibility, from leadership to every team member on site.

items.title: Continuous Improvement
items.desc: We regularly review and enhance our HSE systems to achieve better outcomes.

principles.title: Six fundamental beliefs that guide our actions.
principles.description: These principles form the foundation of our safety culture and drive our commitment to zero harm.

items.title: All injuries are preventable
items.desc: We believe every incident can be avoided through proper planning and execution.

items.title: Visible leadership
items.desc: Management demonstrates commitment through active participation in HSE activities.

items.title: Stop work authority
items.desc: Every employee has the authority and obligation to stop unsafe work.

items.title: Safety is a condition of employment
items.desc: HSE performance is integral to job responsibilities at all levels.

items.title: Hazard identification
items.desc: Proactive identification and control of hazards before work begins.

items.title: Continuous improvement
items.desc: Regular review and enhancement of HSE systems and processes.

training.title: Building a culture of safety through education.
training.description: Our comprehensive training programs ensure that every team member has the knowledge and skills to work safely and protect others.

programs.title: HSE Induction
programs.desc: Comprehensive safety orientation for all new employees and site personnel.

programs.title: Supervisor Training
programs.desc: Advanced HSE leadership and management training for site supervisors and managers.

programs.title: Specialized Courses
programs.desc: Technical training for specific roles and high-risk activities.

programs.title: Competency Assessment
programs.desc: Regular evaluation and certification of HSE competencies across all levels.

certifications.title: Internationally recognized standards.
certifications.description: Our certifications demonstrate our commitment to maintaining the highest standards in health, safety, and environmental management.

items.title: Occupational Health & Safety
items.desc: International standard for occupational health and safety management systems.

items.title: Environmental Management
items.desc: Framework for effective environmental management systems and sustainable practices.

items.title: Quality Management
items.desc: Quality management systems ensuring consistent delivery of high-quality services.

items.title: Safety Prequalification
items.desc: Full compliance with Saudi Aramco's stringent safety and quality requirements.

emergency.title: Ready to respond, 24/7.
emergency.description: Our comprehensive emergency response capabilities ensure rapid and effective action in any situation.

capabilities.title: Medical Emergency Response
capabilities.desc: On-site medical facilities and trained first aiders at all project locations.

capabilities.title: Fire Fighting
capabilities.desc: Certified fire fighting teams and equipment ready for immediate response.

capabilities.title: Spill Response
capabilities.desc: Rapid response teams and equipment for environmental spill containment.

capabilities.title: Evacuation Procedures
capabilities.desc: Well-defined evacuation plans and regular drills at all sites.

emergency.hotlineDesc: Available round the clock for all HSE emergencies

cta.desc: Our HSE team is ready to discuss how we maintain the highest safety standards on every project.

form.submittedDesc: Our team will get back to you within one business day.
form.name: Full Name

items.q: What services does High Dam Group provide?
items.a: We provide integrated project execution services including civil works, MEP, dewatering, shoring, manpower supply, and equipment rental.
We serve Oil & Gas, infrastructure, healthcare, hospitality, commercial, and government sectors across Saudi Arabia.
We maintain ISO 9001, 14001, and 45001 certifications and comply with ARAMCO, SABIC, and EPC HSE requirements.

items.q: How can I request a proposal?
items.a: You can contact us through our contact form, email, or phone. Our team will respond within one business day.
